basic_details.job_title: MPEDA Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Marine Products Export Development Authority (MPEDA) Young Professional-I (Fisheries) Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. YP/02/2026 on the official website https://www.mpeda.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MPEDA Young Professional Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.raw: Date of Notification: 15 June 2026 Last Date for Online Application: 15 July 2026

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Fisheries Science / Aquaculture
qualification.details: Qualification: Master's Degree in Fisheries Science / Aquaculture with specialization in respective fields from a recognized university. Age Limit (as on 01 January 2026): Maximum 27 years (5 years relaxation for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC). Experience: Not mandatory (Freshers can apply).

vacancy_details.details: Post: Young Professional - I (Fisheries) No. of Posts: 1 Place of Posting: MPEDA Desk Office, Sardar Vallabhbhai Niryat Suvidha Kendra, Chunar, Mirzapur, Uttar Pradesh

salary_details.details: Remuneration: ₹40,000/- per month (Consolidated pay). No other facilities or allowances will be provided.

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Written Test (80% weightage) Interview (20% weightage) Final selection by Competent Authority
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates should apply online through MPEDA website www.mpeda.gov.in
Submit the application before the closing date of 15 July 2026.
important_instructions: The position is purely contractual for 1 year, extendable up to 3 years based on performance. Engagement as Young Professional does not confer any right for permanent employment. Candidates must upload valid certificates for educational qualification, age, caste etc. MPEDA reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download MPEDA Young Professional Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download MPEDA Young Professional Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MPEDA Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Post : Young Professional - I (Fisheries) No. of Posts : 1 Place of Posting : MPEDA Desk Office, Sardar Vallabhbhai Niryat Suvidha Kendra, Chunar, Mirzapur, Uttar Pradesh

content_sections.heading: MPEDA Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualification : Master's Degree in Fisheries Science / Aquaculture with specialization in respective fields from a recognized university. Age Limit (as on 01 January 2026) : Maximum 27 years (5 years relaxation for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC). Experience : Not mandatory (Freshers can apply).

content_sections.heading: MPEDA Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Remuneration : ₹40,000/- per month (Consolidated pay). No other facilities or allowances will be provided.

content_sections.heading: MPEDA Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Date of Notification : 15 June 2026 Last Date for Online Application : 15 July 2026

content_sections.heading: MPEDA Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Scrutiny of Applications Written Test (80% weightage) Interview (20% weightage) Final selection by Competent Authority

content_sections.heading: MPEDA Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - General Information / Instructions
content_sections.text: The position is purely contractual for 1 year, extendable up to 3 years based on performance. Engagement as Young Professional does not confer any right for permanent employment. Candidates must upload valid certificates for educational qualification, age, caste etc. MPEDA reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process.

content_sections.heading: MPEDA Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates should apply online through MPEDA website www.mpeda.gov.in Submit the application before the closing date of 15 July 2026 .

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MPEDA Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in MPEDA Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 1 vacancy for Young Professional - I (Fisheries).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Young Professional in MPEDA?
Q4. What is the age limit for MPEDA Young Professional position?
faq.answer: Maximum 27 years as on 01.01.2026 (with relaxation for reserved categories).

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for MPEDA Young Professional?
faq.answer: Master's Degree in Fisheries Science / Aquaculture with specialization in relevant fields.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MPEDA Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: Shortlisting based on application, followed by Written Test (80%) and Interview (20%).
